subcodes.first_line: Say: Glorified art Thou, O Educator of all created things and Fashioner of all existence! I beseech Thee by the Name through which was raised the banner [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قل سبحانک یا مربی الکائنات و موجد الموجودات اسئلک بالاسم الذی به ارتفعت رایه
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @prayer for nearness to God, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
